title: Ancient Ape Fossil In Egypt Rewrites Origins Of Great Apes
description: A newly discovered ape ancestor in Egypt suggests great apes may have evolved beyond East Africa, reshaping understanding of early primate origins.

title: Ancient Egyptian stone monument depicting a Roman emperor as a pharaoh discovered in Luxor
description: A stone slab depicting the Roman emperor Tiberius was found during restoration work at the Karnak temple complex in Luxor.

title: Are ancient grains better for you? The surprising truth about quinoa and spelt
description: Is the hype around the health benefits of ancient grains justified? Scientists say its not as clear-cut as you might think.

title: How DNA forensics is transforming studies of ancient manuscripts
